expectations.text: Provides working Python code (not just description of a fix)
expectations.evidence: skill-making includes complete, copy-paste-ready safe_input() and is_non_interactive() implementations.

expectations.text: Uses sys.stdin.isatty() or equivalent CI env var check (CI, GITHUB_ACTIONS, etc.)
expectations.evidence: is_non_interactive() checks sys.stdin.isatty(), os.getenv('CI'), os.getenv('GITHUB_ACTIONS'), os.getenv('AUTOMATED_MODE').

expectations.text: Wraps input() in a try/except that catches EOFError
expectations.evidence: safe_input() has explicit except (EOFError, KeyboardInterrupt) block.

expectations.text: Provides an automatic default/fallback when running non-interactively
expectations.evidence: safe_input() returns default or choices[0] when is_non_interactive() is True.

expectations.text: The fixed code still works interactively (not just hardcoded non-interactive)
expectations.evidence: Pattern explicitly separates interactive and non-interactive paths; interactive path preserves full input() behavior.
